author: Sarah Nenni-Daher
title: Dirt and Worms Cupcakes
instructions_list: First, prepare and bake the chocolate cupcakes. You will need to let them fully cool before frosting.

Next, put the Oreo™ cookies into a plastic bag and crush them into very fine pieces. You can use the back of a spoon to get any clumps. Note: remove the frosting from inside the cookies or leave it - both ways work.

Make the chocolate frosting or scoop tub frosting into a piping bag or plastic zip top bag. Add a swirl of chocolate frosting to the top of each cupcake - remember, it doesn't have to be pretty, as we will be covering most of it.
Spoon the crushed Oreo™ cookies onto the frosting of each cake. Use as little or as much as you like but start with each getting 2-3 teaspoons to add to the overall look.
Cut a few of the worms into smaller pieces (halves or thirds). Add one full worm and a partial worm to each cupcake.
description: These adorable (and easy) dirt and worms cupcakes are so easy to put together. Make a big impact for a construction themed birthday party, Halloween, or just to play "in the dirt."
